description_long: This is a rectangular bathroom or utility sink set into a thick, stone-textured countertop with a brown, marbled appearance. The sink basin is polygonal and white, recessed into the countertop, and features a central drain. A modern, cylindrical faucet with a single lever handle is mounted at the rear of the sink, positioned above the basin. The underside of the sink reveals a visible drainpipe extending downward, indicating a wall-mounted or floating installation. The countertop has a raised edge at the back, likely to prevent water from splashing onto the wall, and the overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, suitable for public or semi-public urban environments.
description: A polygonal white sink set into a brown marbled countertop with a modern faucet and visible drainpipe, designed for wall mounting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the polygonal basin, faucet, and the thickness of the marbled countertop.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the countertop, the central basin, and the faucet directly above the sink.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the basin and faucet from the other end, with the countertop's marbled texture visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the faucet, the raised back edge of the countertop, and the drainpipe beneath the sink.
